All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
BigHealthPotion
Represents a big health potion.
Board
Represents the game board.
Character
Represents a playable character.
Consumable
Represents a consumable item.
DefensiveEquipment
 
Dice
Represents a virtual dice.
Fireball
Represents the Fireball spell.
Game
Manages the main game logic.
LightBold
Represents the LightBold spell.
Mace
Represents a Mace weapon.
Main
Point d'entrée du jeu Donjons & Dragons en Java.
Menu
Gère l'interaction avec l'utilisateur.
OffensiveEquipment
Represents an offensive equipment item.
OutOfBoardException
Exception thrown when a character's position exceeds the limits of the game board.
SmallHealthPotion
Represents a small health potion.
Spell
Represents a Spell as an offensive equipment.
Sword
Represents a Sword weapon.
Warrior
Represents a Warrior character.
Weapon
Represents a weapon that can be equipped by a character.
Wizard
Represents a Wizard character.
